steps.t: Thama Aklam can be found to the south-east of Ost Anglebed. Steward Malthellim has asked you to defeat the leader of the Haradrim in Thama Aklam.
Steward Malthellim can be found in the Lord's Hall in Ost Anglebed. You have defeated the leader of the Haradrim in Thama Aklam, and should now return…
